series_metadata.series_description: Administrative records consist of branch office applications, reorganizations, and supporting documentation. Such records are obtained by the Division by reason of its official position, through examinationsof the finaincal institutions, and from examina

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain master microfilm in appropriate storage facility for 25 years, then destroy. Retain microfilm copy in operating area for 25 years, then destroy. State Archives to review microfilm before disposition for historical value ; Paper: Retain files in operating area for four years after the savings bank ceases doing business, then microfilm. Destroy hard copy after microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
